title: aster puniceus subsp. elliottii
intro: Aster puniceus subsp. elliottii, also known as Elliott's Purple-stemmed Aster, is a plant species within the Aster family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aster puniceus subsp. elliottii include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, wounds, and respiratory issues.
